title: hieracium prediliense subsp. justinianum
intro: Hieracium prediliense subsp. justinianum, also known as Justinian's Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Justinian's Hawkweed include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
